description: Composition Red sweatshirt jacket made of 100% recycled polyester Stratermic fleece, has long raglan sleeves, a mock neck, short zip opening with contrast colour fleece lining behind zip for non-itch comfort, branding on shoulder and slightly dropped hem at back Wash care Machine wash warm Do not bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean Trust outdoors experts quechua to provide great simple designs which will keep you toasty warm. Extremely lightweight due to the Stratermic fleece – which, by the way, is recycled so your eco-conscience can rest at ease. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
